description: "Update the enabled status of multiple automations in one request."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Batch Update Automation Status"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/automations/status"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Update the enabled status of multiple automations in one request.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["automationIds","enabled"],"properties":{"automationIds":{"type":"array","description":"List of automation IDs.","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"string"}},"enabled":{"type":"boolean","description":"New enabled state. true: enabled; false: disabled."}},"title":"UpdateAutomationStatusRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
